title: haloragis dura
intro: Haloragis dura, also known as the spike rush, is a perennial aquatic plant native to Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Haloragis dura include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the Haloragis dura plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
